calendar.description: Senate Government Operations and Political Subdivisions Hearing

general_provisions: This bill creates citizenship grade standards, attendance-based grading, and a test-out option for core classes.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>permits and establishes requirements for standardizing citizenship grades; <hr><ltbullet>allows parents to opt out of citizenship grading;<hr><ltbullet>allows attendance-based grading; <hr><ltbullet>repeals individualized attendance plans for attendance-based grading; <hr><ltbullet>creates a test-out option for core classes; <hr><ltbullet>establishes a citizenship grade scholarship program in higher education funded through voluntary tax return contributions; and <hr><ltbullet>makes technical changes.
